name: AD360
banner: AD360 criteria are pending official source verification. Please provide the official AD360 Health Check Criteria txt file.

criteria.text: AD360 Windows service is running under a dedicated service account
criteria.recommendation: Review and validate this item with the official product checklist: AD360 Windows service is running under a dedicated service account

criteria.text: AD360 is on the latest available build
criteria.recommendation: Review and validate this item with the official product checklist: AD360 is on the latest available build
Review and validate this item with the official product checklist: Server hardware meets minimum requirements

criteria.text: AD360 uses an external database (MSSQL/PostgreSQL) in production
criteria.recommendation: Review and validate this item with the official product checklist: AD360 uses an external database (MSSQL/PostgreSQL) in production

criteria.text: AD360 license is valid and covers all required domains
criteria.recommendation: Review and validate this item with the official product checklist: AD360 license is valid and covers all required domains
Review and validate this item with the official product checklist: Annual Maintenance Subscription (AMS) is active

criteria.text: ADManager Plus integration is configured and operational
criteria.recommendation: Review and validate this item with the official product checklist: ADManager Plus integration is configured and operational

criteria.text: ADAudit Plus integration is configured and operational
criteria.recommendation: Review and validate this item with the official product checklist: ADAudit Plus integration is configured and operational

criteria.text: ADSelfService Plus integration is configured and operational
criteria.recommendation: Review and validate this item with the official product checklist: ADSelfService Plus integration is configured and operational

criteria.text: HTTPS/TLS is enforced for the web console
criteria.recommendation: Review and validate this item with the official product checklist: HTTPS/TLS is enforced for the web console

criteria.text: Two-factor authentication is enabled for admin accounts
criteria.recommendation: Review and validate this item with the official product checklist: Two-factor authentication is enabled for admin accounts

criteria.text: Role-based access control is configured with least privilege
criteria.recommendation: Review and validate this item with the official product checklist: Role-based access control is configured with least privilege
Review and validate this item with the official product checklist: Automated database backup is configured
